Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT bs."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, count(distinct(bs.bldg_id)) AS sample_count, (count(distinct(bs.bldg_id)) * sum(bs.weight)) / CAST(sum(1) AS DECIMAL) AS units_count, sum(ts_aggr._inner_rows) / CAST(count(distinct(bs.bldg_id)) AS DECIMAL) AS rows_per_sample, sum(ts_aggr."bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(coalesce(ts_aggr."up__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", ts_aggr."bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption") * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__upgrade", sum((coalesce(ts_aggr."bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(coalesce(ts_aggr."up__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", ts_aggr."bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption"), 0)) * bs.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__savings", sum(ts_aggr."bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(coalesce(ts_aggr."up__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", ts_aggr."bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption") * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__upgrade", sum((coalesce(ts_aggr."bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(coalesce(ts_aggr."up__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", ts_aggr."bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption"), 0)) * bs.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__savings" FROM (SELECT ts_flat.timestamp AS timestamp, ts_flat.bldg_id AS bldg_id, sum(ts_flat."_v__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption") FILTER (WHERE ts_flat.upgrade = 0) AS "bs__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(ts_flat."_v__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption") FILTER (WHERE ts_flat.upgrade = 1) AS "up__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", sum(ts_flat."_v__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption") FILTER (WHERE ts_flat.upgrade = 0) AS "bs__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", sum(ts_flat."_v__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption") FILTER (WHERE ts_flat.upgrade = 1) AS "up__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", count(*) FILTER (WHERE ts_flat.upgrade = 0) AS _inner_rows FROM (SELECT resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.bldg_id AS bldg_id, date_trunc('year', date_add('second', -900, resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.timestamp)) AS timestamp, resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.upgrade AS upgrade, resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" AS "_v__out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" AS "_v__out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.upgrade IN (0, 1) AND resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_by_state_vu.state IN ('CO', 'WY')) AS ts_flat GROUP BY ts_flat.timestamp, ts_flat.bldg_id) AS ts_aggr JOIN resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata AS bs ON bs.bldg_id = ts_aggr.bldg_id AND bs.upgrade = 0 GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/86df5144c6d782e8f5c6cc9467808a8d88e691597054d832cc6f88837111838f/e4c16050-f6cb-4b0c-9373-d177bc3a8ec9/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
